assertions.name: Query-Time Weights Parameter
assertions.description: computeMatchScore accepts optional weights parameter for query-time adjustment.
testsRun: VAL-WEIGHTS-001: accepts weights parameter in options
VAL-WEIGHTS-001: accepts hybrid blend in weights parameter
VAL-WEIGHTS-001: accepts combined scoring and blend weights
assertions.details: All 3 test cases passed. Function correctly accepts weights parameter with skills, location, rate, role, ruleWeight, and vectorWeight components.

assertions.name: Default Backward Compatibility
assertions.description: When no weights provided, function uses existing env var defaults.
testsRun: VAL-WEIGHTS-002: produces same result without weights parameter
VAL-WEIGHTS-002: uses default SCORING_WEIGHTS when weights not provided
VAL-WEIGHTS-002: uses default HYBRID_BLEND when weights not provided
VAL-WEIGHTS-002: verifies default scoring weights
VAL-WEIGHTS-002: verifies default hybrid blend
assertions.details: All 5 test cases passed. Default weights (skills=40, location=20, rate=20, role=20) and hybrid blend (ruleWeight=0.6, vectorWeight=0.4) verified correct.

assertions.name: Per-Component Weight Override
assertions.description: Individual weight components (skills, location, rate, role) can be overridden.
testsRun: VAL-WEIGHTS-003: skills weight override affects score
VAL-WEIGHTS-003: location weight override affects score
VAL-WEIGHTS-003: rate weight override affects score
VAL-WEIGHTS-003: role weight override affects score
VAL-WEIGHTS-003: partial weight override only affects specified components
VAL-WEIGHTS-003: multiple component overrides work together
assertions.details: All 6 test cases passed. Individual weight components can be independently overridden while preserving other factors.

assertions.name: Invalid Weight Handling
assertions.description: Invalid weight values (negative, >1, NaN) are rejected with validation error.
testsRun: VAL-WEIGHTS-004: throws error for negative weight
VAL-WEIGHTS-004: throws error for weight > 1
VAL-WEIGHTS-004: throws error for NaN weight
assertions.details: All 3 test cases passed. validateDynamicWeights correctly throws errors for invalid inputs including -0.1, 1.01, and NaN values.

assertions.name: Vector/Rule Blend Override
assertions.description: HYBRID_BLEND can be overridden via weights parameter.
testsRun: VAL-WEIGHTS-005: ruleWeight override affects hybrid calculation
VAL-WEIGHTS-005: vectorWeight override affects hybrid calculation
VAL-WEIGHTS-005: 100% rule-based blend ignores vector
VAL-WEIGHTS-005: 100% vector blend emphasizes similarity
assertions.details: All 4 test cases passed. Custom ruleWeight/vectorWeight ratios correctly affect the hybrid calculation.
